derived_methodology.weight_source: Eight required CPI-U unadjusted Relative Importance series
derived_methodology.weight_month_alignment: Relative Importance attached to the same API observation as the target monthly change
derived_methodology.formula: (base weight x base change - excluded weighted changes) / effective remaining weight
derived_methodology.caveat: Dashboard-derived approximation. Results may differ from official BLS special aggregate indexes.
